subject: [PATCH man-pages v1 5/6] UFFDIO_REGISTER.2const: Document UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and 1 << _UFFDIO_RWPROTECT

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch updates the documentation for the UFFDIO_REGISTER system call in the Linux kernel's man pages. Specifically, it adds descriptions for two new features: UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and 1 << _UFFDIO_RWPROTECT. The first feature allows tracking of every access (read or write) to a present page within a registered range, while the second feature is related to reporting notifications when the range has been protected with UFFDIO_RWPROTECT. The patch also clarifies compatibility with various file systems and error handling for invalid combinations of modes.
